_meta.document: STAR ELZ V1 — Sprint State Ledger
_meta.purpose: Single source of truth spanning Sprint 1 → Sprint 4. Canonical names are authoritative. TF display names and legacy Excel names are recorded separately for traceability. Do not update Terraform code to match legacy Excel names.
_meta.architecture: Hub-and-Spoke | 5 VCNs | 2 DRGs (primary + E-W placeholder) | Sim FW hairpin | OCI Bastion | OCI Private DNS

naming_convention.note: Canonical naming sync complete (2026-03-01). tf_display_name now equals canonical_name across all resources. Legacy Excel names retained for traceability only.
naming_convention.canonical: C1_<TEAM>_ELZ_<DOMAIN> for compartments, UG_<TEAM>_ELZ_<DOMAIN> for groups, vcn_<team>_elz_nw for VCNs
naming_convention.legacy_excel: star-<team>-elz-<domain>-cmp — DRIFTED, do not use in new code

teams.name: Team 1
sprint2_owns: nw_team1.tf — C1_OS_ELZ_NW VCN + subnet + DRG attach + Sim FW

teams.name: Team 2
sprint2_owns: nw_team2.tf — C1_TS_ELZ_NW VCN + subnet + DRG attach + Sim FW

teams.name: Team 3
sprint2_owns: nw_team3.tf — C1_SS_ELZ_NW + C1_DEVT_ELZ_NW VCNs + subnets + DRG attaches + Sim FW (SS only)

teams.name: Team 4
sprint2_owns: nw_team4.tf — C1_R_ELZ_NW Hub VCN + DRG (primary) + drg_r_ew_hub (placeholder) + Sim FW + Bastion

iam._note: All canonical names below are authoritative. Legacy Excel names (star-*-cmp) are recorded in tf_display_name for traceability only.

compartments.description: Hub Network — DRGs (drg_r_hub + drg_r_ew_hub), Hub VCN, Sim FW, Bastion
Security — Cloud Guard, Vault, Security Zones
Operations — Flow Logs, Service Connector, Deployment Pipeline
Common Services — APM, File Transfer, ServiceNow, Jira
Dev Common Services — dev toolchain shared services

SS Spoke — VCN 10.2.0.0/24, subnets, NSGs, workload
TS Spoke — VCN 10.3.0.0/24, subnets, NSGs, workload

compartments.provisioning: MANUAL Console — created Day 1 Sprint 1 by T4, destroyed end of V1

keys.values: Network | Security | Operations | SharedSvc | Dev | Simulation

network._architecture_note: Hub-and-Spoke via drg_r_hub (primary). drg_r_ew_hub = E-W placeholder, no attachments, V2 scope. E-W traffic flow: Spoke → DRG → Hub transit subnet → vm_dummy_fw (hairpin 10.0.3.10) → DRG → Spoke. Sprint 2 V1 uses Sim FW compute; Sprint 3 replaces with OCI NFW.
network._two_drg_note: Architecture shows 2 DRGs in C1_R_ELZ_NW: (1) DRG icon = drg_r_hub (primary, all VCN attachments) and (2) Inter E-W DRG icon = drg_r_ew_hub (empty placeholder for V2 E-W segmentation). Both are in nw_team4.tf.

vcns.gap_vs_architecture: V1 isolated — no IGW provisioned in Sprint 2 per HK review. Sprint 3 scope.

Sprint2 code defaults spoke VCN to /16 — architecture specifies /24. Variable var.os_vcn_cidr must be set to 10.1.0.0/24 in tfvars. Default in code is wrong and must be corrected before Sprint 2 apply.
Same /16 vs /24 issue as OS spoke. Set var.ss_vcn_cidr = 10.2.0.0/24 in tfvars.
Same /16 vs /24 issue. Set var.ts_vcn_cidr = 10.3.0.0/24 in tfvars.

vcns.sprint2_code_status: provisioned — network only, no compute in V1
vcns.gap_vs_architecture: Same /16 vs /24 issue. Set var.devt_vcn_cidr = 10.4.0.0/24 in tfvars.

drg_route_tables.name: rt_drg_hub_to_fw
drg_route_tables.purpose: CRITICAL: all DRG ingress → Hub VCN for FW inspection

drgs.role: E-W placeholder — zero attachments in V1, dedicated inter-spoke segmentation in V2
drgs.sprint2_code_status: GAP — not yet provisioned in current sprint2 code. Must be added to nw_team4.tf.
drgs.sprint2_gap_action: Add oci_core_drg resource for drg_r_ew_hub (zero attachments). Required by architecture diagram and TC-12.

subnets.sprint2_code_status: GAP — Sprint2 code has hub_fw subnet (10.0.0.0/24 private) and hub_mgmt (10.0.1.0/24). Architecture requires 4 hub subnets. Sprint 2 V1 simplified to 2; full 4-subnet hub is Sprint 3.

subnets.purpose: Bastion SSH access, Dummy AD mgmt
subnets.sprint2_code_status: Partially mapped — sprint2 hub_mgmt subnet is 10.0.1.0/24, architecture specifies 10.0.2.0/24. Sprint 2 simplified CIDR plan.

subnets.purpose: vm_dummy_fw hairpin at fixed IP 10.0.3.10, OCI Private DNS listener at 10.0.3.53
subnets.critical: vm_dummy_fw MUST have private IP 10.0.3.10 — hairpin route rule hardcodes this
subnets.sprint2_code_status: Mapped as hub_fw subnet (10.0.0.0/24 in V1). Full CIDR alignment Sprint 3.
NOT provisioned in Sprint 2. Sprint 3 scope.
Provisioned as /24 (10.1.0.0/24). Architecture specifies /25 for app + /25 for lb. V1 simplified to single /24. Sprint 3 to correct.
NOT provisioned in Sprint 2. Sprint 3 scope.
Provisioned as /24. Sprint 3 to split to /25.
Provisioned as /24. Sprint 3 to split to /25.
Provisioned as /24. Sprint 3 to split to /25.

route_tables.name: rt_hub_public

rules.description: Hub public subnet: Bastion internet access

route_tables.sprint2_code_status: NOT provisioned (no IGW in Sprint 2 V1 isolated design). Sprint 3 scope.

route_tables.name: rt_hub_transit

rules.description: HAIRPIN: all outbound → vm_dummy_fw (iptables fwd + NAT) — CRITICAL for E-W inspection

route_tables.sprint2_code_status: PARTIAL — Sprint 2 hub_fw RT is empty (V1 no IGW). Hairpin rule and return routes are Sprint 3 scope (requires vm_dummy_fw with fixed IP 10.0.3.10).

route_tables.name: rt_hub_mgmt
route_tables.sprint2_code_status: Phase 2 DRG rule provisioned. NGW not provisioned (Sprint 3).

route_tables.name: rt_spoke_os

rules.description: All OS outbound → Hub DRG → FW inspection

route_tables.sprint2_code_status: DRG default route provisioned in Phase 2.

route_tables.name: rt_spoke_ss
route_tables.sprint2_code_status: DRG default route provisioned in Phase 2.

route_tables.name: rt_spoke_ts
route_tables.sprint2_code_status: DRG default route provisioned in Phase 2.

route_tables.name: rt_spoke_devt
route_tables.sprint2_code_status: DRG default route provisioned in Phase 2.

security_lists._note: Not provisioned in Sprint 2. Defined here as target state for Sprint 3.

lists.name: sl_hub_dmz
lists.key_rules: INGRESS tcp 0.0.0.0/0 :22 (SSH to Bastion), INGRESS icmp 10.0.0.0/8, EGRESS all

lists.name: sl_hub_mgmt
lists.key_rules: INGRESS tcp 10.0.1.0/24 :22 (Bastion only), INGRESS icmp 10.0.0.0/8, EGRESS all

lists.name: sl_hub_transit
lists.key_rules: INGRESS all 10.0.0.0/8 (FW inspects), EGRESS all (FW forwards+NATs)

lists.name: sl_os_app
lists.key_rules: INGRESS tcp 10.0.0.0/8 :22, INGRESS icmp 10.0.0.0/8, EGRESS all

lists.name: sl_ss_app
lists.key_rules: INGRESS tcp 10.0.0.0/8 :22/:443, INGRESS icmp 10.0.0.0/8, EGRESS all

lists.name: sl_ts_app
lists.key_rules: INGRESS tcp 10.0.0.0/8 :22, INGRESS icmp 10.0.0.0/8, EGRESS all

lists.name: sl_devt_app
lists.key_rules: INGRESS tcp 10.0.1.0/24 :22 (Bastion only), INGRESS icmp 10.0.0.0/8, EGRESS all

groups.name: nsg_hub_fw
groups.key_rules: INGRESS all 10.0.0.0/8 (all internal → FW VNIC), EGRESS all 0.0.0.0/0

groups.name: nsg_devt_app
groups.key_rules: INGRESS tcp 10.0.1.0/24 :22, INGRESS icmp 10.0.0.0/8, EGRESS all

endpoints.name: dns_listener_hub
endpoints.purpose: Hub DNS listener — receives from all Spoke forwarders

instances.sprint_scope: Sprint 2 Sim FW (nw_team4.tf) — V1 simulation of OCI NFW
instances.critical: Fixed IP 10.0.3.10 MUST be set — hairpin route table rule hardcodes this. Change = black-hole.

instances.note: Sprint 2 uses OCI Bastion Service (oci_bastion_bastion), not a compute instance
In C1_SIM_EXT (manual compartment). Simulates AD Bridge. Destroy in V2 cleanup.
In C1_SIM_CHILD (manual compartment). Hello World workload. Destroy in V2 cleanup.

buckets.name: bkt_elz_central_logs
buckets.purpose: VCN flow logs from all 5 VCNs via Service Connector Hub

buckets.name: bkt_elz_audit_archive
buckets.purpose: Tenancy audit logs — 90 day compliance archive

buckets.name: bkt_elz_tf_state
buckets.purpose: Terraform remote state backend — lock with OCI Lock
buckets.note: Create manually BEFORE first TF apply. TF cannot manage its own backend bucket.

gaps_and_actions.description: Spoke VCN CIDRs in sprint2 code default to /16 (e.g. 10.1.0.0/16). Architecture specifies /24.
gaps_and_actions.impact: If deployed with /16, spoke VCNs will be over-allocated and subnets will use wrong CIDR space.
gaps_and_actions.action: Set correct values in terraform.tfvars before Sprint 2 apply: os_vcn_cidr=10.1.0.0/24, ss_vcn_cidr=10.2.0.0/24, ts_vcn_cidr=10.3.0.0/24, devt_vcn_cidr=10.4.0.0/24
gaps_and_actions.owner: T1 (network lead), confirm with all spoke teams

gaps_and_actions.description: drg_r_ew_hub (Inter E-W DRG) not provisioned in sprint2 code. Only drg_r_hub exists.
gaps_and_actions.impact: TC-12 will fail. Architecture diagram shows 2 DRGs in C1_R_ELZ_NW.
gaps_and_actions.action: Add oci_core_drg 'ew_hub' resource to nw_team4.tf. Zero attachments — V1 placeholder only.

gaps_and_actions.description: Sprint2 hub has 2 subnets (fw: 10.0.0.0/24, mgmt: 10.0.1.0/24). Architecture requires 4 hub subnets (public /24, mgmt /24, transit /24, lb /24) starting at 10.0.1.0/24.
gaps_and_actions.impact: vm_dummy_fw hairpin IP 10.0.3.10 is in the transit subnet (10.0.3.0/24) which doesn't exist yet. E-W routing simulation requires this subnet.
gaps_and_actions.action: Add sn_hub_fw_transit (10.0.3.0/24) and sn_hub_public (10.0.1.0/24) in Sprint 3. Refactor sprint2 hub_fw subnet to align with sn_hub_fw_transit CIDR.

gaps_and_actions.description: DRG transit routing (oci_core_drg_route_table + oci_core_drg_route_distribution) not implemented. OCI DRG v2 full-mesh means spoke-to-spoke bypasses Hub FW.
gaps_and_actions.impact: E-W traffic not inspected by vm_dummy_fw. TC-09 (hairpin) will fail without this.
gaps_and_actions.action: Sprint 2 Phase 2: DRG route tables added to nw_team4.tf. rt_drg_hub_to_fw forces all DRG ingress toward Hub VCN attachment via Sim FW 10.0.3.10.

gaps_and_actions.description: Sprint1 output names for spoke compartments use suffix _nw (os_nw_compartment_id, ss_nw_compartment_id etc.) but sprint2 variable names drop the _nw (os_compartment_id, ss_compartment_id).
gaps_and_actions.impact: Operators must know to map sprint1 output os_nw_compartment_id → sprint2 variable os_compartment_id. Easy to mismap.
gaps_and_actions.action: Already documented in variables_iam.tf descriptions and tfvars template. No code change needed. Ensure operators follow the 'From: terraform output X' comments.
gaps_and_actions.owner: All teams during Sprint 2 ORM setup

gaps_and_actions.description: Security Lists and NSGs not provisioned in Sprint 2. Sprint 2 subnets have no security controls beyond the VCN default.
gaps_and_actions.impact: V1 validation only uses NPA (control plane) and Sim FW for Sprint 2. Acceptable for isolated V1 environment.
gaps_and_actions.action: Sprint 3: Add all 12 SLs and 7 NSGs per SecurityLists and NSGs sheets.

required_outputs_from_sprint1.note: Output suffix _nw dropped in sprint2 variable name
Output suffix _nw dropped in sprint2 variable name
Output suffix _nw dropped in sprint2 variable name

ORM Plan zero drift after Phase 2

assumptions_and_decisions.decision: Single drg_r_hub attaches all 5 VCNs. drg_r_ew_hub created empty — V2 dedicated E-W DRG.
assumptions_and_decisions.v2_action: Replace with dedicated drg_r_ew_hub for inter-spoke E-W; retain drg_r_hub for N-S (IPSec)

assumptions_and_decisions.decision: Dummy FW = vm_dummy_fw (iptables + IP forwarding). Fixed private IP 10.0.3.10. No OCI NFW in V1.
assumptions_and_decisions.v2_action: Replace vm_dummy_fw with OCI Network Firewall (L7)

assumptions_and_decisions.decision: OCI Private DNS replaces vm_dns_bind compute. Hub listener 10.0.3.53, spoke forwarders at .53 in each spoke.
assumptions_and_decisions.v2_action: Extend DNS rules for AD integration

assumptions_and_decisions.decision: Spoke admins get 'use virtual-network-family in C1_R_ELZ_NW' — required for DRG routing at runtime
UG_ELZ_NW gets manage on Hub, read on Spokes (SoD)
vm_dummy_fw fixed private IP 10.0.3.10. Change = route table black-hole.
assumptions_and_decisions.v2_action: Replace with OCI NFW private IP

assumptions_and_decisions.decision: No IGW in Sprint 2 V1 isolated design (Han Kiat review 27 Feb 2026)
assumptions_and_decisions.v2_action: Sprint 3 adds IGW for north-south public subnet

assumptions_and_decisions.decision: vm_hello_world in C1_SIM_CHILD@sn_devt_app — simulates child tenancy workload
vm_dummy_ad in C1_SIM_EXT@sn_hub_fw_mgmt — simulates AD Bridge. NAT Gateway access for packages.
assumptions_and_decisions.v2_action: Replace with actual AD Connect or ADFS

assumptions_and_decisions.decision: bkt_elz_tf_state created manually before first TF apply — TF cannot manage its own backend
CIS Level 1 in V1. Vault auto-enabled if cis_level=2.
No IPSec/FastConnect in V1. N-S simulation deferred.
assumptions_and_decisions.v2_action: Add IPSec VPN to drg_r_hub in V2

assumptions_and_decisions.decision: Flow log retention 30 days. Service Connector archives to bucket.
Hub DNS listener at 10.0.3.53 (transit subnet). No conflict with vm_dummy_fw at 10.0.3.10.

sprint1_complete.action: terraform output -json > sprint1_outputs.json; git tag sprint1-complete; share outputs with Sprint 2 lead

sprint2_phase1_gate.criteria: TC-07 and TC-08 PASS — 5 VCNs and 6 subnets confirmed
sprint2_phase1_gate.action: T4 runs: terraform output hub_drg_id; share DRG OCID with all teams for Phase 2

sprint2_complete.criteria: TC-07 through TC-17 all PASS (including TC-12b for drg_r_ew_hub)
sprint2_complete.action: terraform output -json > sprint2_outputs.json; git tag sprint2-complete

v1_complete.criteria: ALL P0 ★ TCs PASS + git tag v1.0 + State Ledger signed off by Sprint Lead
v1_complete.action: git tag v1.0; update sprint_state_ledger.json all statuses to PASS; State Book sign-off
